# DATPAQ Unit Conversion API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ Unit Conversion API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/unit-conversion
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- Conversion route used by this sample: /v1/unit-conversion/convert
- Supporting lookup routes:
  - /v1/unit-conversion/categories
  - /v1/unit-conversion/units/:category
- OpenAI metadata (machine-readable): /openai.json

## What this app demonstrates
- Live category discovery before conversion.
- Live unit lookup for the selected measurement category.
- Single-value unit conversion with optional precision and reverse mode.
- Required request validation for API key, category, units, and value.
- Loading, empty, error, and success state rendering.
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Request contract
- `GET /v1/unit-conversion/categories` returns available conversion categories.
- `GET /v1/unit-conversion/units/:category` returns valid units for a category.
- `POST /v1/unit-conversion/convert` accepts JSON with:
  - `from` (string, required)
  - `to` (string, required)
  - `value` (number, required)
  - `precision` (integer, optional, 0-15)
  - `reverse` (boolean, optional)

## Output contract
- Successful single conversions include `success`, `data`, `meta`, and `correlationId`.
- Common result fields include:
  - `data.from`
  - `data.to`
  - `data.value`
  - `data.result`
  - `meta.processingTimeMs`
  - `meta.timestamp`
